name: IdsEdwMbrCaseDefnIExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH NA_SET AS (SELECT 1 AS MBR_CASE_DEFN_SK,'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD,1 AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY,'175301' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK,'NA' AS CASE_DEFN_ID,'1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,1 AS CASE_DEFN_SK,1 AS MBR_MED_MESRS_SK,100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), UNK_SET AS (SELECT 0 AS MBR_CASE_DEFN_SK,'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD,0 AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY,'175301' AS PRCS_YR_MO_SK,'UNK' AS CASE_DEFN_ID,'1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,'1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,0 AS CASE_DEFN_SK,0 AS MBR_MED_MESRS_SK,100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), MAIN AS (SELECT MCD.MBR_CASE_DEFN_SK,CASE WHEN CM.TRGT_CD IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(CM.TRGT_CD)='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE CM.TRGT_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD,MCD.MBR_UNIQ_KEY,MCD.PRCS_YR_MO_SK,MCD.CASE_DEFN_ID,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,MCD.CASE_DEFN_SK,MCD.MBR_MED_MESRS_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_CASE_DEFN MCD LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON MCD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CM.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE MCD.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND MCD.MBR_CASE_DEFN_SK<>0 AND MCD.MBR_CASE_DEFN_SK<>1) SELECT * FROM NA_SET UNION ALL SELECT * FROM UNK_SET UNION ALL SELECT * FROM MAIN
